message:
refactor(tests): replace DirGuard/set_current_dir with explicit start path parameter

Eliminate the DirGuard/set_current_dir test anti-pattern that mutated
process-wide CWD, requiring TEST_DIR_LOCK mutexes to serialize tests.
Commands now accept an explicit start path parameter instead.

- agents.rs: remove DirGuard and TEST_DIR_LOCK, execute_json() takes
  explicit work_dir: &Path
- close.rs: remove DirGuard, execute_with_args() takes optional
  start: Option<&Path>, execute_cli() builds CloseArgs directly
- info.rs: remove DirGuard/TEST_DIR_LOCK/LazyLock<Mutex>,
  collect_info_output() takes start: Option<&Path>, fix import of
  CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION from storage::sqlite
- where.rs: remove DirGuard, tests updated for new resolve signature
- orphans.rs: update close::execute_with_args() call with None start path
- main.rs: fix argument order in info::execute() call
- config/mod.rs: add discover_beads_dir_with_cli_and_start() helper to
  plumb explicit start directory through discovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -203,7 +203,7 @@ fn main() {
         }
         Commands::Sync(args) => commands::sync::execute(&args, cli.json, &overrides, &output_ctx),
         Commands::Doctor(args) => commands::doctor::execute(&args, &overrides, &output_ctx),
-        Commands::Info(args) => commands::info::execute(&args, &overrides, &output_ctx),
+        Commands::Info(args) => commands::info::execute(&args, &output_ctx, &overrides),
         Commands::Schema(args) => commands::schema::execute(&args, &overrides, &output_ctx),
         Commands::Where => commands::r#where::execute(&overrides, &output_ctx),
         Commands::Version(args) => commands::version::execute(&args, &output_ctx),
